calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jennifer Pantaleon, Plaintiff/Respondent, appears in pro per.
No appearance by Defendant/Appellant, C.Partner's, Inc.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Jennifer Pantaleon, plaintiff/respondent testifies on hew own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court renders judgment in favor of the plaintiff/respondent, Jennifer Pantaleon and against appellant/plaintiff C. Partners, Inc. for the total amount of $658.71.

JPT Richard Wise, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
